final:
// // This module selects between two 32-bit input signals, A and Pc. When ALUSrcA is low (0), the output (muxout) is assigned the value of input A; when ALUSrcA is high (1), the output is assigned the value of input Pc.
module top_module(
    input [31:0] A,
    input [31:0] Pc,
    input ALUSrcA,
    output reg [31:0] muxout
);always @(A, Pc, ALUSrcA)begin
  if (ALUSrcA)begin
    muxout <= A;
  end
  else
    muxout <= Pc;
end
endmodule
